meaning: n.泛滥,灌溉,[化]溢流,(油漆干燥时或加热时的)变色,产后出血
examples: The heavy rains and flooding killed scores of livestock.
In the weeks since flooding began, 16 people have died statewide.
When water levels rise, flooding results.
And he cautioned against central banks flooding the financial system with too much liquidity.
Even if much of central Bangkok is spared, the flooding has had a dramatic enough impact already.
